name: The Fool
meaning_upright: New beginnings, spontaneity, innocence, leap of faith, free spirit.
meaning_reversed: Recklessness, hesitation, naivety, poor judgment, fear of change.
love: new romance, emotional openness, spontaneous connection, taking a chance on love
love_reversed: reckless romance, fear of commitment, naive expectations, leaping without looking
career: new career path, taking a professional risk, entrepreneurial leap, learning through experience
career_reversed: reckless decisions, poor planning, fear of starting, missed timing
spiritual: spiritual beginning, trust in the journey, openness to the unknown, following inner guidance
spiritual_reversed: aimless wandering, ignoring inner guidance, fear of the unknown, avoiding the path

name: The Magician
meaning_upright: Manifestation, willpower, resourcefulness, skill, focused action.

love_reversed: manipulation, mixed signals, unfulfilled potential, deception in romance

spiritual: focused intention, conscious manifestation, aligning will and action, recognizing personal power
spiritual_reversed: misused power, spiritual illusion, disconnection from intention, self-deception

spiritual_reversed: silenced intuition, blocked inner voice, secrets kept from the self, lost inner wisdom
